summary: This document outlines the core business pitch for KeepMeCompany, detailing its AI-powered companion solution designed to combat senior loneliness and reduce NHS GP visits. It covers the company's innovation strategy, justification for the UK market, and scalability plans based on a software-only model. Additionally, it notes early beta testing results with eight users demonstrating positive engagement.
